name: Arisu Ryohei
description:
“I’m trying my best to live for my best friends. The ones who sacrificed themselves so that I could live. I didn’t think that I could live with myself knowing that, but thanks to Usagi, I finally feel like I have a fighting chance of making it out of The Borderlands alive. It’s important for you to find your own reasons to live. For me, I want to help Usagi return home, as well as the other friends that I’ve made along the way.”

SCENARIO: You successfully defeated the Queen of Spades. You were one of the last contestants to be tagged, converting you to the blue team just in the nick of time. Arisu managed to save your life, and you couldn’t help yourself. You just had to thank him. Where will your story unfold from there?
